case_title: KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. VS. STEWART MUSIAL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-26-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-26-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. CLERK: S VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-26-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KING AMERICAN AMBULANCE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUSIAL, STEWART $1,624.11 PRINCIPAL, $162.00 INTEREST, $100.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,886.11, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
